summary: Completed testing of Garden Designer Phase 3 (Generate Design) feature. Backend API tests all passed (6/6). Frontend full flow tested successfully - draw boundary, fill details, navigate to Step 3, click Generate, see appropriate error for missing API key.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/garden/generate returns 400 with 'OpenAI API key not configured' when user has no key
Backend: POST /api/garden/generate returns 404 if project not found
Backend: GET /api/garden/designs/{project_id} returns empty list for project with no designs
Backend: POST /api/garden/generate returns 422 for invalid payload (missing required fields)
Backend: POST /api/garden/generate returns 403 for unauthenticated request
Backend: GET /api/garden/designs/{project_id} returns 403 for unauthenticated request
Frontend: Garden Designer page loads at /projects/{projectId}/garden-designer
Frontend: 3-step progress bar (Draw Boundary, Garden Details, Generate Design) visible
Frontend: Canvas with grid loads for drawing boundaries
Frontend: Drawing polygon with 4+ points and closing works correctly
Frontend: 'Garden boundary completed!' toast shows on polygon close
Frontend: 'Shape Complete' indicator visible after closing polygon
Frontend: Continue to Garden Details button appears after polygon closed
Frontend: Step 2 form displays with all required fields
Frontend: Latitude/Longitude inputs work correctly
Frontend: Wind direction buttons selectable (Southwest tested)
Frontend: Garden Goal options selectable (Mixed Garden tested)
Frontend: Plant preference badges toggleable (Vegetables, Herbs tested)
Frontend: Summary section shows validation status for all fields
Frontend: Generate Garden Design button enables when all required fields filled
Frontend: Step 3 displays input summary correctly (Garden Size, Location, Wind, Type, Plants)
Frontend: Generate Design button visible on Step 3
Frontend: Generate button calls API and shows loading state briefly
Frontend: Error message '[data-testid=generation-error]' displays 'OpenAI API key not configured'
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Please configure your OpenAI API key in Settings first'
Frontend: 'Go to Settings to configure your API key' link button appears
critical_code_review_comments: Garden Designer Phase 3 implementation is complete and working as expected
All data-testid attributes present for testing: garden-designer-page, generate-card, generate-design-btn, generation-loading, generation-error
Error handling properly displays API key missing error to user
UI provides helpful link to Settings page for API key configuration
Input summary on Step 3 correctly displays all user inputs before generation
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing Community Garden project (ID: 72868dc9-f97d-4209-83e8-8d2c6fd59c67)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Garden Designer Phase 3 fully tested. The feature requires user to have OpenAI API key configured in Settings to generate designs. Without API key, returns 400 with appropriate error message. Frontend properly handles the error and shows user-friendly message with link to Settings. Key test IDs: garden-designer-page, generate-card, generate-design-btn, generation-loading, generation-error. API routes: POST /api/garden/generate, GET /api/garden/designs/{project_id}. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_garden_designer.py for regression testing.
